mapper.sql: fj.id, fj.job_name,fj.enabled_flag,fj.job_sequence,fj.authorized_strength,fj.job_code,fj.job_class,fj.dept_id, fj.job_describes,fj.data_scope,fj.deleted_flag,fj.create_time, fj.create_by, fj.update_time, fj.update_by, ROW_NUMBER() Over (ORDER BY fj.id) as row_id

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.job_name as ${tAlias}_job_name, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.job_sequence as ${tAlias}_job_sequence, ${tAlias}.authorized_strength as ${tAlias}_authorized_strength, ${tAlias}.job_code as ${tAlias}_job_code, ${tAlias}.job_class as ${tAlias}_job_class,${tAlias}.job_describes as ${tAlias}_job_describes,${tAlias}.data_scope as ${tAlias}_data_scope, ${tAlias}.deleted_flag as ${tAlias}_deleted_flag,${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_dept_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
,
from fnd_job fj join fnd_dept fd on fj.dept_id = fd.id

select
,
,
from fnd_job fj left outer join fnd_dept fd on fj.dept_id = fd.id left join pm_employee_job pej on fj.id = pej.job_id and pej.enabled_flag = 1 left join pm_employee pe on pej.employee_id = pe.id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0
mapper.insert: insert into fnd_job (job_name, enabled_flag, job_sequence, authorized_strength, job_code, job_class, dept_id, job_describes, data_scope, deleted_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{jobSequence,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{authorizedStrength,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dept.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{jobDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataScope,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deletedFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update fnd_job set job_name = #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, job_sequence = #{jobSequence,jdbcType=BIGINT}, authorized_strength = #{authorizedStrength,jdbcType=INTEGER}, job_code = #{jobCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_class = #{jobClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_id = #{dept.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, job_describes = #{jobDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_scope = #{dataScope,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: order by fd.ext_dept_id, fd.ext_department_id, fd.ext_team_id, fj.job_sequence
select max(job_sequence) maxSequence from fnd_job where deleted_flag = 0
mapper.update: update fnd_job set job_sequence = job_sequence + 1 where deleted_flag = 0 and job_sequence >= #{sequence,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update fnd_job set job_sequence = job_sequence - 1 where deleted_flag = 0 and job_sequence > #{sequence,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select fj.job_name as job_name,fd.dept_name as dept_name,fj.job_class as job_class from fnd_job fj left join fnd_dept fd on fj.dept_id=fd.id where fj.create_time>getdate()-1 and fd.enabled_flag=1 and fd.deleted_flag=0
select DISTINCT TOP 350 certification_job, job_level, work_content,process FROM td_job_grading WHERE enabled_flag = 1 AND certification_job IS NOT NULL
